args.search_query: US Steel 10-K 2024 Nippon Steel merger operational impact workforce investment cost savings

call.purpose: Find the most recent 10-K (year ended December 31, 2024) for US Steel to understand how the merger is discussed in terms of operational impacts, risks, and any forward-looking statements about investments, cost synergies, or supply chain.
